fields.name: name
fields.description: A human-readable identifier for the agent.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A brief explanation of the component's function.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current operational state of the component.

fields.name: query
fields.description: The text used to initiate a search or request.

fields.name: context
fields.description: The surrounding information used for processing.

fields.name: response
fields.description: The text output generated by the agent.

fields.name: memoryHits
fields.description: The number of memory hits retrieved.

fields.name: searchHits
fields.description: The number of search results retrieved.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Details about any errors encountered during processing.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The textual data associated with an item.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Classification or type of the agent rag.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: Defines the boundaries or area of focus.

fields.name: strength
fields.description: A numerical value representing confidence or relevance.

fields.name: pinned
fields.description: Indicates whether the item is marked as important.

fields.name: language
fields.description: The language used for processing and generation.

fields.name: resultCount
fields.description: The number of results returned.

fields.name: results
fields.description: The output or outcome of a process or operation.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: The text used as input for generating a response.

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Identifies the source or service providing data.

fields.name: model
fields.description: Specifies the language model used for processing.

fields.name: activeTab
fields.description: The currently selected tab within the interface.

fields.name: items
fields.description: A list of items retrieved or processed.

fields.name: lastAccessedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last access to the data.

fields.name: message
fields.description: The text content of the completion message.

fields.name: notificationType
fields.description: Indicates the type of notification generated.

children.content: Enter a query to retrieve context and generate a response

effects: Provide a comprehensive answer based on the retrieved context.

children.content: Enter a query to retrieve context and generate a response

emits.description: Signals a tab selection has occurred.

events.name: Tab Changed
events.description: Signals a tab selection has occurred.

orientation.label: Orientation
orientation.description: Horizontal strip or vertical rail layout

variant.label: Tab style
variant.description: Visual style of the tab strip

defaultTab.label: Default tab
defaultTab.description: Tab id selected on first render

tabs.label: Tabs
tabs.description: Tab entries with id, label, icon, badge, and optional content trait

bodyContent.label: Body content tree
bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered for the tabs surface. Default is the canonical tabs pattern bound to @entity.items / @entity.activeTab. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (segmented-pill bar, vertical sidebar rail, etc.) while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

fields.name: activeTab
fields.description: The currently selected tab's identifier.

fields.name: items
fields.description: A collection of tab specifications defining the tab structure.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the memory's purpose or contents.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current operational state of the component.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The data stored within the memory.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Classification or type of the memory data.

fields.name: strength
fields.description: A numerical value representing the intensity or magnitude.

fields.name: pinned
fields.description: Indicates whether the item is marked as important.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: Indicates the data's lifecycle and accessibility.

fields.name: lastAccessedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last access to the data.

fields.name: results

fields.name: language

fields.description: The total number of results found.

fields.name: name
fields.description: A user-facing identifier for the completion.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the completion's purpose.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current operational state of the process.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: The text used as input to generate a completion.

fields.name: response
fields.description: The output or result generated by the agent.

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Identifies the source of the completion data.
